---
name: Normative change proposal
about: Propose a change to the OHAS core standard, profiles, assurance levels, or normative language
title: "[Normative] "
labels: ["proposal", "normative-change"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the proposed normative change in one or two sentences.

## Affected Area

Select all that apply.

- [ ] Core standard (`OHAS_STANDARD.md`)
- [ ] Policy profiles (`profiles/`)
- [ ] Assurance levels
- [ ] Schemas (`schemas/`)
- [ ] Governance rules
- [ ] Other normative material

## Problem Statement

What problem does this proposal solve?
Why is the current text insufficient, ambiguous, or inconsistent?

## Proposed Change

Describe the exact change you are proposing.

Where useful, include replacement wording, additional wording, or a short structural outline.

## Rationale

Why is this change desirable?
How does it improve OHAS?

## Impact Assessment

Describe any expected impact on:

- existing profiles
- assurance levels
- examples
- audit guidance
- repository structure
- future implementers

## Breaking Change?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Not sure

If yes, explain what would break or need revision.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Add links, examples, prior discussions, or related issues here.
